fields.Name: Abigail Beethoven Sciuto
fields.Background: Birthplace: New Orleans, Louisiana Family: Adopted by deaf parents, which led her to learn American Sign Language (ASL) as her first language. She also has an adoptive brother, Luca Sciuto, and a biological brother, Kyle Davis Childhood: Moved frequently across the southern U.S., gaining a broad cultural understanding. Work:
fields.Strengths: Analyzing forensic evidence like DNA, fingerprints, and ballistics Running toxicology reports and chemical analyses Using cutting-edge tech to solve crimes Collaborating closely with field agents, especially Gibb
fields.Weaknesses: Childish, Emotional depending on others, dosen´t like changes and is overconfident.
